validation.command: source /home/admin1/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate robotwin && export MPLCONFIGDIR=/tmp/mpl_robotwin && export ROBOTWIN_MAX_SEED_TRIES=10 && python script/collect_data.py move_pillbottle_pad_rotate_view annotated_video_smoke_headless
notes: both subtasks completed successfully under render_freq=0
the sampled easy episode again started from current-frame visibility, so stage2 immediately followed begin_subtask
Real subtask ids start from 1; 0 is reserved for init/non-task frames.
Per-frame numeric labels are written into the episode HDF5 root datasets.
String-rich subtask mappings and transition traces are written into sidecar JSON under data/<task>/<setting>/subtask_metadata.
scene_info.json keeps per-episode entries and links each one to subtask_metadata_path instead of inlining all rotate metadata.
Rotate episodes now also export a head-camera sidecar video at video/episodeX_annotated.mp4, with frame/stage/subtask instruction/found objects overlay.

Search stage now only enters stage2 when the target is visible in the current frame; otherwise stage1 uses discrete unit turns and reverses when the current-side table edge endpoints enter view without finding the target.
Stage2 now uses image-space horizontal offset to do fine yaw centering and no longer directly faces the GT object world point during search.
Place/stack/ranking tasks explicitly update carried_object_keys around grasp and release so subtask switching remains consistent in saved annotations.
Observed real-collection seed-stage failures were mostly recoverable pre_grasp_pose=None or UnStableError cases; all were absorbed by retries under ROBOTWIN_MAX_SEED_TRIES=50.
Whitelist rotate subtasks now read templates from description/task_instruction/<task>.json and resolve episode-specific text with the same placeholder pipeline as original task instructions.
